messages.content: لطفا پاراگراف زیر را بازیالب کنید به انگلیسی. With a peak potential separation of 360 mV, this sensor displayed two distinct oxidative peaks at 390 mV for DNR and at 750 mV for DTIC, allowing for the simultaneous detection of the two anticancer medications.

With a peak potential separation of 360 mV, this sensor demonstrated two separate oxidative peaks at 390 mV for DNR and at 750 mV for DTIC. As a result, it enables the simultaneous detection of the two anticancer drugs.

لطفا پاراگراف زیر را بازیابی کنید به انگلیسی. A significant anticancer medication, Dacarbazine [5-(3,3-dimethyl-l-triazenyl) imidazole-4-carboxamide; DTIC] is used to treat Hodgkin's disease, malignant melanoma, paediatric solid tumours, and soft tissue sarcoma

Dacarbazine [5-(3,3-dimethyl-1-triazenyl)imidazole-4-carboxamide; DTIC], an important anticancer drug, is employed in the treatment of Hodgkin's disease, malignant melanoma, pediatric solid tumors, as well as soft tissue sarcoma.

لطفا پاراگراف زیر را بازیابی کنید به انگلیسی. Because the liver is where DTIC is activated, producing the very reactive methyl diazonium cation, DTIC is known as alkylating agents. The anticancer characteristics of this cation are noteworthy. The DNA bases are methylated by DTIC, and these DNA damages result in cell death, primarily by apoptosis

Due to the activation of DTIC in the liver, which generates the highly reactive methyl diazonium cation, DTIC is classified as an alkylating agent. The potent anticancer properties of this cation are remarkable. DTIC methylates the DNA bases, leading to DNA damage and subsequent cell death, primarily through apoptosis.
لطفا جمله زیر را بازیابی کنید به انگلیسی. Common adverse effects are vomiting, a lack of appetite, a low platelet count, and a low white blood cell count.
Common side effects include nausea, loss of appetite, thrombocytopenia (low platelet count), and leukopenia (low white blood cell count).
جمله زیر را بازیابی کنید. a lack of appetite, a low platelet count, and a low white blood cell count.
A decrease in appetite, reduced platelet count, and low white blood cell count are observed.

لطفا جمله زیر را بازیابی کنید به انگلیسی. The DNR and DTIC analyses have been conducted using a variety of laboratory-based analytical techniques, including high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC)
The analysis of DNR and DTIC has been performed using various laboratory-based analytical techniques, such as high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC).
لطفا جمله زیر را بازیابی کنید. Finally, this method was successfully used to quickly and accurately identify DNR and DTIC medicines in real samples.
Ultimately, this method proved to be effective in the rapid and precise identification of DNR and DTIC drugs in actual samples.

Cyclic voltammograms (CVs) of 1000.0 µM DAN were recorded at different scan rates (a to k) ranging from 5 to 100 mV s-1 in a 0.1 M PBS (pH 7.0) solution using MOF-235/GO/CPE as the working electrode. Inset: Plot of Ipa and Ipc versus ν 1/2 for the redox reaction of DAN at various scan rates (5-100 mVs-1).

Cyclic voltammograms (CVs) were obtained for 1000.0 µM DAN at different scan rates (a to k) spanning from 5 to 100 mV s-1 in a 0.1 M PBS (pH 7.0) solution using MOF-235/GO/CPE as the working electrode. The inset displays a plot of Ipa and Ipc against ν 1/2 for the redox reaction of DAN at different scan rates (5-100 mV s-1).
